title: selaginella monospora subsp. trichophylla
intro: Selaginella monospora subsp. trichophylla is a species of spore-bearing vascular plant, also known as a resurrection fern, that belongs to the Selaginellaceae family. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the immune system. Selaginella monospora subsp. trichophylla can be prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, and its extracts have been used in traditional Chinese medicine to treat various health conditions.
